word: G1774 - ἐνοικέω - enoikéō - en-oy-keh'-o - Dwell in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐνοικέω

- Transliteration: Enoikeo

- Phonetic: en-oy-keh'-o

- Definition:

1. to dwell in

2. metaph. to dwell in one and influence him (for good)

- Origin: from G1722 and G3611

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and G3611; to inhabit (figuratively): - dwell in.
